task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-sonnet-2, spec-conformance, BLOCKER): adapter-node binds :3000 because Dockerfile sets only ENV SHIELD_C2_PORT=8888, never ENV PORT=8888, and ENTRYPOINT [node,build] does not bridge SHIELD_C2_PORT->PORT; launcher passes -e SHIELD_C2_PORT but not -e PORT. Service unreachable at 10.0.0.88:8888. Violates A1/D4/AC1/AC14/AC17/I5. Evidence: sc_sonnet2_final.js exit 1, three independent confirmation points. This blocker halts the gate and routes the generation stage; no override permitted.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-sonnet-2, spec-conformance, MAJOR): both Dockerfile FROM lines omit --platform=linux/arm64; building on an amd64 host yields an amd64 manifest that cannot run on the Shield's arm64 4.9 kernel. Violates D3/AC12/I9. Evidence: sc_sonnet2_final.js.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-sonnet-2, security, MINOR): decodeLogs() misdetects TTY-container logs — the frame loop always produces one 'frame', the lines.length===0 fallback never fires, silently dropping the first 8 raw bytes ('Starting application...' -> 'application...'). Confirmed: security-sonnet2-tty-bug.mjs. Not a security vuln; functional log corruption. gen-opus-1's demux() (first-byte<=2 check) is correct.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-sonnet-2, security, MINOR): sanitizeId() regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_.\-]+$ admits leading dot/dash (e.g. '.hidden','--privileged'); weaker than gen-opus-1's ^[A-Za-z0-9][...]* anchor. Not exploitable (daemon 404s invalid names) but below I2 best-practice strictness.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-sonnet-2, resilience, MINOR): sampler setInterval never stops at zero SSE clients — continuous /proc reads against I10 resource frugality. gen-opus-1 calls maybeStop() on subscriber-set drain.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: DEFECT (gen-opus-1, spec-conformance, MINOR — RESOLVED): candidate bundle ships only shield-c2/.dockerignore, no root .gitignore (AC16/I12). Arbiter verified G:/Documents/GIT/LOCAL-mod/NVIDIAShield/.gitignore already exists with *.apk/*.apkm/*.img/*.zip/*.tgz + node_modules/.svelte-kit/build/docker-bringup/docker exclusions, satisfying T12. Root .gitignore is §8 preflight infra, not a §7 generation deliverable. Fail is a test-scope artifact; required pre-deploy action is to CONFIRM the existing root .gitignore is staged, not author a new one.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: REQUIRED PRE-DEPLOY (gen-opus-1, spec-conformance, must-fix-before-build): the Dockerfile FROM digest is a placeholder, not a verified live arm64 digest for node:20-bookworm-slim. AC12/AC13 cannot truly pass on-device until the real arm64 manifest digest is substituted. Self-declared by gen-opus-1 and corroborated by spec-conformance-rev; carried as a build-gate, not a review blocker (no network access in the generation environment).

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: ACCEPTED RESIDUAL RISK (gen-opus-1, security): no Origin/CORS check on mutations — cross-origin-POST is reachable. Explicitly accepted by spec A2/D5 threat model; allowlist {start,stop,restart of existing containers} bounds blast radius. Documented, not mitigated, per 'simplest correct'.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: ACCEPTED TRADE-OFF (gen-opus-1, resilience): a throw inside Promise.all drops the whole sampler tick rather than one collector (per-collector try/catch mostly prevents this); an error event is still emitted and the SSE stream stays open per spec §3. Minor smoothing of one tick's delta dt; not a crash, not a spec-mandated failure-recovery failure.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: ARBITER DISSENT NOTE: spec-conformance-rev's AC16 fail on gen-opus-1 stands as recorded but does NOT block commit, because the deploy target already satisfies AC16; this is reconciliation of a test-scope mismatch, not an override of an active blocker.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: spec-conformance-rev recorded AC16 as a fail on gen-opus-1; the arbiter reconciles it as a test-scope mismatch (root .gitignore is §8 preflight infra already present in the repo, not a §7 generation deliverable) rather than a deploy-blocking defect. The reviewer's artifact result stands; the arbiter's reclassification of its severity-to-gate effect is the point of residual disagreement, logged here for audit.

task: shield-c2: SvelteKit status/C2 container for the Shield Docker host
entry: gen-opus-1's own self-declared spec-conformance note (placeholder digest, untested image size near the 250MB target) is unresolved by definition in this offline environment — it converts to the required pre-deploy build-gate in merge_plan item 1 and on-device gate item 3, but cannot be closed at arbitration time without network + the physical Shield.
